{{Short description|Italian film festival in 2019}} {{Use dmy dates|date=July 2020}} {{Infobox Film festival | name = 76th Venice International Film Festival | image = 76th Venice Film Festival poster.jpeg | caption = Official festival poster by [[Lorenzo Mattotti]]. | opening = ''[[The Truth (2019 film)|The Truth]]'' | closing = ''[[The Burnt Orange Heresy]]'' | location = [[Venice]], [[Italy]] | founded = 1932 | awards = [[Golden Lion]]:
''[[Joker (2019 film)|Joker]]'' | host = [[Alessandra Mastronardi]] |artistic_director= [[Alberto Barbera]] | date = 28 August – 7 September 2019 | website = {{URL|labiennale.org/en/cinema}} | chronology = Venice Film Festival | preceded_by = [[75th Venice International Film Festival|75th]] | followed_by = [[77th Venice International Film Festival|77th]] }} The '''76th annual [[Venice Film Festival|Venice International Film Festival]]''' was held from 28 August to 7 September 2019, at [[Venice Lido]] in [[Italy]].{{cite web |url=https://www.labiennale.org/en/news/regulations-76th-venice-international-film-festival |title=Regulations of the 76th International Film Festival |work=labiennale.org |access-date=21 January 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190122195509/https://www.labiennale.org/en/news/regulations-76th-venice-international-film-festival |archive-date=22 January 2019 |url-status=dead }} Argentine filmmaker [[Lucrecia Martel]] was the jury president for the main competition.{{cite web|url=https://deadline.com/2019/06/venice-film-festival-lucrecia-martel-jury-president-1202636971/|title=Venice Film Festival Appoints 'Zama' Director Lucrecia Martel As Jury President|last=Wiseman|first=Andreas|work=[[Deadline Hollywood]]|date=24 June 2019|access-date=24 June 2019}} [[Alessandra Mastronardi]] hosted the opening and closing nights of the festival.{{cite web |date=27 August 2019 |title=Venezia 76: ecco la madrina Alessandra Mastronardi |url=https://www.repubblica.it/dossier/spettacoli/venezia-2019/2019/08/27/news/venezia_76_la_parola_a_alessandra_mastronardi_madrina_della_mostra_-234474311/ |access-date=27 August 2019 |work=[[La Repubblica]] |language=it}} The [[Golden Lion]] was awarded to ''[[Joker (2019 film)|Joker]]'' by [[Todd Phillips]].{{cite web |date=7 September 2019 |title='Joker' Wins Venice Film Festival Golden Lion, Roman Polanski Gets Grand Jury Prize |url=https://www.indiewire.com/2019/09/venice-film-festival-2019-winners-1202171696/ |access-date=7 September 2019 |work=[[IndieWire]]}} The festival opened with ''[[The Truth (2019 film)|The Truth]]'' by [[Hirokazu Kore-eda]], and closed with ''[[The Burnt Orange Heresy]]'' by [[Giuseppe Capotondi]].{{cite web |url=https://variety.com/2019/film/news/hirokazu-koreeda-the-truth-open-venice-film-festival-1203271534/ |first=Nick |last=Vivarelli |title=Hirokazu Kore-eda's 'The Truth' With Catherine Deneuve, Juliette Binoche to Open Venice Film Festival |work=[[Variety (magazine)|Variety]] |date=18 July 2019 |access-date=18 July 2019}} ==Juries== === Main Competition (''Venezia 76'') === * [[Lucrecia Martel]], Argentine filmmaker - Jury President{{cite web|url=https://www.labiennale.org/it/news/le-giurie-internazionali-della-biennale-cinema-2019|title=Le giurie internazionali della Biennale Cinema 2019|trans-title=The international juries of the 2019 Cinema Biennale|date=24 August 2019|access-date=25 August 2019|language=it}} * [[Piers Handling]], Canadian film historian and critic, executive
